requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL provide a business-neutral `depa-actor-control` vendor package under the project root `vendor/` directory.

case.given: The vendor package defines actor control primitives
case.when: A maintainer reviews exported types and tests
case.then: The package SHALL NOT contain AI, LLM, tool-call, questionnaire, member, delegate, or holon domain names
The package SHALL depend only on business-neutral dependencies

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL model actor control operations as data with target identity, causality, idempotency, and expected barrier metadata.

case.given: A control operation targets an actor or fiber
case.then: The operation SHALL be represented as serializable data
The operation SHALL NOT directly invoke an actor implementation

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL classify pending mailbox work using business-neutral work classes.

case.given: A mailbox entry is inspected by a domain classifier
case.when: The classifier returns a work class
case.then: The work class SHALL be one of recoverable input, mandatory completion, interrupt, control marker, low priority continuation, timer wake, or an explicitly named extension

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL provide control barrier result types that describe whether an actor control boundary may advance.

case.when: The barrier result is returned to a caller
case.then: The blocker list SHALL include bounded metadata such as participant id, work class, phase, and reason
The blocker list SHALL NOT require large payloads to explain the block

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL model durable head cohorts as groups of recovery truth heads that advance only after a matching control barrier is safe.

case.given: A durable head cohort contains multiple heads
case.when: The associated barrier is not safe
case.then: The cohort SHALL NOT advance any recoverable head as the latest truth
